_comment: Human verdicts on ttn_audit candidate pairs that are NOT merges — semantic false positives the tool cannot detect (a shared catalogue ref / performer across genuinely distinct works). Recorded by candidate_id, the stable per-pair hash. ttn_audit is currently stateless and does not yet read this file; it is the seed for the planned decisions-file filter (see docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-16-ttn-audit-design.md, 'Candidate identity'). A multi-member group lists every contributing pair id. Append a new entry whenever a candidate is triaged and rejected.

rejected.reason: the four distinct movements of The Four Seasons rearranged — one shared title stem, no machine signal; lengths 12-14m differ
two distinct arias from Rinaldo (HWV 7); shared opera + performer, different pieces; lengths 10m vs 4m
titles: Cara sposa, amante cara, from 'Rinaldo, HWV 7'

rejected.reason: two distinct arias from Serse (HWV 40); shared opera + performer, different pieces; lengths 4m vs 6m
titles: Crude furie degli orridi abissi from Serse (HWV.40)

rejected.reason: a Menuet excerpt plus a separate anthem vs the whole Trio Sonata HWV 399; excerpt-vs-whole, not a merge; lengths 9m vs 12m
titles: Menuet, from 'Trio Sonata in G, HWV 399'; O Lord, whose Mercies numberless
Trio Sonata in G, HWV 399 - Sonata per orchestra, Op 5/4
